title: Circle, no payload
watch: The clean case. The gatekeeper certifies nearly every tick, so the quad races the line.

title: Split-S, no payload
watch: An inverted, aggressive track. Watch the quad bank and roll: the tilt is the real attitude, not a flat icon.

title: Grand Prix, no payload
watch: Ten gates on the bare quad, gatekeeper airtight. This is the track we follow as a load goes on.

title: Grand Prix, swinging load, model frozen
watch: Same track, now a tethered load the model never saw. The band is too wide to certify, so the gatekeeper refuses to commit and crawls the backup.

title: Grand Prix, swinging load, model learned
watch: Learn the residual on this track and the commit comes back: the quad races the swinging load instead of crawling.

title: Grand Prix, bolted-on load, model frozen
watch: A rigid load bolted under the quad, model frozen. It commits on the straights, falls back through the hard gates.

title: Grand Prix, bolted-on load, model learned
watch: The same bolted-on load with the residual learned: it commits through most of the track.

title: Chicane, swinging load (the frontier)
watch: The hardest reversals plus a swinging load. Even a learned model cannot certify this yet: this is the open problem.
